title: Google Ads Performance Max Guide

seoMeta.title: Google Ads Performance Max Guide | VedantVerse
seoMeta.description: Master Performance Max campaigns with this blockbuster strategy guide.

summary: The ultimate blueprint to scaling eCommerce and lead-gen campaigns using Google's flagship AI campaign type. Learn asset group structuring, conversion value rules, and secret audience signal setups.
content:
# The ₹5L Campaign: Scaling Performance Max Like a Pro

Performance Max (PMax) is no longer a choice—it is the default engine for scaling conversions across search, shopping, YouTube, and display. In this campaign breakdown, we details the exact strategy used to scale a luxury apparel brand to ₹15.4L managed spend at a **8.45x ROAS**.

## Key Takeaways

* **Audience Signals are Not Targeting**: They are hints to guide Google's bidding algorithm. Start with high-intent customer match lists and bottom-of-funnel custom segments.
* **Asset Group Separation**: Never mix products. Group items by margin or average order value (AOV) to optimize budget efficiency.
* **Creative Diversity**: A single video asset can shift a campaign's search-to-display conversion ratio by up to 40%.

## 1. Structuring the Asset Groups

Many media buyers make the mistake of dumping all their assets into a single group. This dilutes the message and leads to poor relevance scores. Here's our recommended setup:

```txt
Asset Group A: Best Sellers (High Margin)
Asset Group B: Trendsetters (New Collections)
Asset Group C: Clearance/Promotional
```

## 2. Advanced Optimization Hacks

To prevent PMax from bidding on your brand keywords, implement a brand exclusion list immediately in the campaign settings.
